metadata.label: gen2/Geico-SWE2
metadata.title: Software Engineer II
metadata.team_direction: GEICO is a leading insurance company that offers quality coverage to millions of customers

revision_priority: Trim the oversized Skills buckets so each category stays within 4-8 items and reads cleaner to ATS.
Add Code Review to Skills and make the backend ownership boundary in the transition story explicit.
把 `Code Review` 明确加入 `Skills`，让 JD 必须关键词在技能区完整出现。
portfolio_review.main_failure_reason: Trim the oversized Skills buckets so each category stays within 4-8 items and reads cleaner to ATS.

findings.issue: 开头把自己写成了“Transitioning from Analytics”的转型叙事，首屏角色锚点被削弱；HR 先看到的是路径变化，而不是明确的后端工程方向。
findings.fix: 把第一句改成“Backend engineer with 3+ years...”这类后端先行的 framing，把“from analytics”的转向信息挪到第二句或删弱。

findings.issue: 首段首条 bullet 只有技术改进型量化，没有 Tier 1 规模/scope 锚点，作为开屏抓手不够强。
findings.fix: 如果属实，在这条里补一个具体 scope 信号，例如请求量、服务数、SLO、团队边界或数据规模，再保留 28% 的延迟改进结果。

findings.issue: JD 明确要求 Advanced PowerShell scripting skills，以及 continuous delivery / infrastructure as code 的支撑性交付工具证据；简历目前只写了 Shell、Docker、Kubernetes 和 Azure-connected workflows，PowerShell/IaC 证据没有落到正文。
findings.fix: 如果真实做过，把 PowerShell 和一次 Azure 发布/自动化/IaC 具体实践补到最相关的后端或部署 bullet 里；如果没有，至少不要让当前表述暗示已经覆盖了这条要求。

revision_priority: [MUST] 把 Summary 第一句改成 backend-first framing，去掉或后移“Transitioning from Analytics”的首屏权重。
[MUST] 补一条真实的 PowerShell / CI-CD / IaC 证据到最相关的 cloud 或 deployment bullet，覆盖 JD 的 support-tool 要求。
[SHOULD] 给 TikTok 第一条 bullet 加一个可追问的 scope 锚点，让开屏先看到规模再看到 28% 改进。
[NICE] 轻微收敛转型叙事，减少首屏“路径变化”感。
raw_json.revision_instructions: [MUST] Rewrite Summary sentence 1 as backend-first (e.g. “Backend engineer with 3+ years...”) and move or downplay the analytics-transition phrasing. [MUST] Add a concrete PowerShell / CI-CD / IaC artifact in the most relevant backend or cloud bullet if truthful, ideally near the existing deployment-validation or Azure wording. [SHOULD] Add one scope anchor to TikTok bullet 1 if available (request volume, service count, SLO, or team boundary) before the latency gain. Do not change any immutable experience fields.

[SHOULD] 给 TikTok 第一条 bullet 加一个可追问的 scope 锚点，让开屏先看到规模再看到 28% 改进。
